description:
`.js.map` source map files are currently included in the npm tarball, adding ~200KB of unnecessary size.

**Fix:** Exclude source maps from the published package via `.npmignore` or by updating `tsconfig.json` to not emit source maps, or by adding `!build/**/*.map` to the `files` array in `package.json` (check which approach is cleanest given the current tsconfig setup).

**Note:** Source maps may be useful during development — verify the fix doesn't break the dev workflow before committing.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- `npm pack --dry-run` output shows no `.js.map` files
- Package size is reduced by ~200KB
- Build and test still work correctly
title: chore: strip source maps from npm package
